articles.title: Pundit says oil prices hold key to Iran ceasefire
articles.description: A ceasefire between the US and Iran is likely to drive down global crude oil prices to around US$70 per barrel, according to a specialist on the US and Chinese economies.

articles.title: Wright: Oil Flows Through Hormuz Back to Normal, Price to Continue Falling
articles.description: I'm long out of the business of predicting oil or gasoline prices, but they will continue to head down, Wright said. Flows of oil and natural gas through the straits have already returned to normal, and they will continue that way whatever happens with the negotiations with the Iranians.

articles.title: Energy Secretary Says Strait Of Hormuz Traffic Back To Normal, Predicts Decline In Oil Prices Amid Trump’
articles.description: US Sec. of Energy Wright announces oil traffic through Strait of Hormuz back to normal after US-Iran agreement to reopen vital waterway.

articles.title: Oil Prices Slide After Iran Deal, But Analysts Warn Gasoline Relief Will Take Months
articles.description: Brent crude futures fell 0.1% to $77.18 a barrel on Thursday, June 18, 2026, according to market data [1]. West Texas Intermediate crude slid 0.3% to $75.78 a barrel the same day [1]. The declines brought oil prices to their lowest levels since the start of the US-Iran conflict on February 28, when benchmarks had […]

articles.title: Rupee rebounds, but risks abound
articles.description: The rupee has experienced a brief rebound fueled by optimism surrounding the potential reopening of the Hormuz Strait and a decrease in oil prices. Although government interventions provide short-term relief, the currency’s long-term vulnerability is evidenced by sluggish investments and insufficient participation in critical growth sectors such as AI.

articles.title: Using E20 Petrol in an Old Vehicle? Follow These 5 Steps Immediately to Protect Your Engine
articles.description: Using E20 Petrol in an Old Vehicle? Follow These 5 Steps Immediately to Protect Your Engine - Cars and bikes manufactured before April 2023 were generally not designed for high-ethanol-blended fuel. Experts warn that using E20 petrol in such vehicles may lead to reduced mileage, damage to engine components, and corrosion-related issues over time. articles.title: UK drivers ditch petrol and diesel cars as fuel £20 a tank higher
articles.description: Many UK drivers could be set to hand over the keys and ditch their petrol and diesel cars as fuel prices remain a major concern.

articles.title: UK £480 car tax system ‘not fair’ warns Treasury
articles.description: EXCLUSIVE: Motoring fees paid by millions of petrol and diesel owners have been described as 'not fair' by the Treasury.

articles.title: Bike riding collegian killed in head-on collision with dumper on Nagothane-Roha Rd
articles.description: 22-year-old biker Raj Ganesh Patang died in a head-on collision with a dumper on Nagothane-Roha Road near Nayara petrol pump; driver booked for rash driving.

articles.title: Triple deaths in Miryalaguda fire were murders
articles.description: Hyderabad: Triple murder in Miryalguda ruled arson after forensic petrol traces and CCTV linked Sireesh Kumar to burning a woman and two grandsons.
